/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/pom2_headless.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/ClockCard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/DiskImage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/DiskIICard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/EmulationController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/LeChatMauveCard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/Mockingboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/SuperSerialCard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pom2_headless.dir/SystemProfile.cpp.o -o pom2_headless  -ldl -lm
